description: arXiv:2509.21028v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce SciTrek, a synthetic question-answering dataset for assessing and improving long-context numerical reasoning in large language models (LLMs). Existing long-context datasets with inputs beyond 64K tokens either target simple information retrieval or, when they do involve reasoning, rely on artificial contexts, while numerical reaso...
author: Miao Li, Alexander Gurung, Irina Saparina, Mirella Lapata
